notes: Merged with Compaq in 2002; split into HP Inc. (PC/printer) and Hewlett Packard Enterprise (server/services) in 2015

PC CPU supplier mentioned as key component vendor in consumer PC market context
Post-split HP entity carrying on the PC and printer businesses; successor to HP's personal systems division
